properties.name: Bodø air station
properties.rule: Military / sensitive installation. Photo & sensor bans (incl. airborne cameras) may apply in NSM zones near here. The real NSM zones aren't drawn on this map, may sit elsewhere, and may exist at sites not marked here — always check NSM's map. Near a military area, flying itself may need the local commander's OK. (BSL A 7-2 §7 · FOR-2018-06-22-951 §6)
